description_long: This is a large, single-story suburban house with a sprawling layout and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The property is surrounded by a low wall and features a well-maintained front yard with several trees and shrubs. The backyard includes a swimming pool, patio area, and additional landscaping, providing ample outdoor living space. The house has multiple visible windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps leading up to it. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and driveway. The property is bordered by a wide street, indicating its placement in a residential neighborhood.
description: A large, single-story suburban house with a dark gabled roof, landscaped yards, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a low wall and facing a wide street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with several trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and more trees, as well as the side of the house and wall.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, and patio area, with the house and landscaping visible from behind.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the backyard pool area and the side of the house, with the street and wall in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a prominent front door, flanked by windows and landscaping.
